title: Handmade Scripture Card Set - 12 Faith Encouragement Cards
description: A set of 12 hand-lettered scripture and encouragement cards printed on heavyweight cardstock. Each card features a different passage from the Psalms, Proverbs, or New Testament - the verses I return to most in my own devotional practice. Beautiful for journaling, gifting, or placing on a nightstand. Cards measure 4x6 inches, packaged in a kraft envelope with a linen ribbon. Made in my Cooper-Young home studio in Memphis, TN.
tags: scripture cards,faith gift,encouragement cards,bible verse,handmade cards,Memphis,devotional gift,Christian gift

title: Pressed Zinnia & Lavender Bookmark Set - 4 Pack
description: Four handmade bookmarks featuring real pressed zinnias and lavender sprigs from my Cooper-Young backyard garden, sealed under protective laminate. Each bookmark is unique - no two are identical because no two blooms are. Measures 2x7 inches, includes a braided tassel. Perfect for the readers in your life, especially those who love Henri Nouwen, Barbara Kingsolver, or anything that smells like summer. Ideal for journals, devotionals, and paperbacks.
tags: pressed flower bookmark,zinnia,lavender,handmade bookmark,garden gift,faith gift,book lover gift,Memphis

title: Handmade Seed Packet Gift Set - Zinnia, Black-Eyed Susan & Lavender
description: Three hand-labeled seed packets harvested from my Cooper-Young backyard garden: zinnias (golden/orange mix), black-eyed Susans, and English lavender. Each packet contains enough seed for a generous border planting. Labels feature a hand-lettered verse about growth and tending. Packaged in a small kraft box with a ribbon. A lovely gift for a gardener, a new homeowner, or anyone who needs something hopeful to tend. Seed viability tested; harvest year 2025.
tags: seed packet,zinnia seeds,lavender seeds,black-eyed Susan,garden gift,handmade gift,faith gift,gardening

title: Hand-Lettered Prayer Journal - Linen Cover, 120 Pages
description: A softcover prayer and reflection journal with a natural linen cover, hand-lettered with 'Be Still' in my own script. Interior features 120 cream-colored, lightly lined pages with a small devotional prompt at the top of each page. Prompts rotate through gratitude, lament, listening, and intention - the four movements of contemplative prayer I use in chaplaincy. Size A5 (5.5x8.5 inches). Sewn binding lays flat. Ribbon marker included. Made in Memphis, sent with love.
tags: prayer journal,faith journal,hand lettered,linen journal,devotional,chaplain,Christian gift,contemplative

title: Dried Herb Bundle - Lavender & Rosemary from Memphis Garden
description: A hand-tied bundle of dried lavender and rosemary harvested from my backyard garden in Memphis, TN. Approx. 8-10 inches long, tied with natural twine. Wonderful hung in a kitchen, tucked in a linen closet, or displayed in a vase. Rosemary for remembrance; lavender for peace - that's always been my pairing. Listing includes two bundles per order. Dried and packaged fresh each week.
tags: dried herbs,lavender bundle,rosemary,herb bundle,garden gift,natural decor,Memphis,aromatherapy

title: Handmade Sympathy & Comfort Card - 'You Are Not Alone'
description: A single handmade sympathy card with hand-lettered text and a delicate botanical illustration printed on heavyweight matte cardstock. Inside message: 'Grief is the price of love, and love is always worth it.' Blank space for your personal note. Ships in a protective sleeve with a kraft envelope. As a hospital chaplain, I've sat with loss more times than I can count. I wrote this card for the moments when words feel impossible. 5x7 inches.
tags: sympathy card,condolence card,hand lettered,grief card,comfort card,chaplain,faith card,botanical

title: Bird Feeder - Painted Porch Stake, Soldered Wire & Bottle
description: A cheerful backyard bird feeder made from a repurposed glass bottle, soldered wire cradle, and a painted wooden stake. Fills through the bottle mouth; the bottle hangs inverted to dispense seed slowly. Hand-painted with a zinnia motif in yellows and oranges. Approximately 18 inches total stake height. My backyard birds are picky about feeders - after years of trial and error, this design keeps the squirrels out and the cardinals coming back. Stake pushes into soft ground; no tools needed.
tags: bird feeder,garden decor,handmade feeder,zinnia,painted garden,backyard bird,porch decor,Memphis

title: Advent & Christmas Card Set - 8 Cards with Envelopes
description: A set of 8 hand-lettered Advent and Christmas cards - 4 unique designs, 2 of each. Themes: Hope, Peace, Joy, Love (the four Advent candle themes). Each card features botanical linework and a corresponding scripture. Printed on 110 lb matte cardstock. 4.25x5.5 inches, A2 size with matching kraft envelopes. Designed to mail as cards or use as gift enclosures. I design a new set each November in time for the season.
tags: Advent cards,Christmas card set,hand lettered,faith Christmas,botanical,scripture card,holiday card,Christian

title: Hand-Lettered Encouragement Mug Wrap - Printable Digital Download
description: A printable mug wrap template in two colorways (warm terracotta and soft sage green), formatted for standard 11oz and 15oz mugs. Lettered with 'This is the day the Lord has made - rejoice' in my hand lettering style. Download includes PDF and PNG files. Print at home or at a local print shop on sublimation paper for a DIY mug gift. Instructions included. No physical item ships - this is a digital file delivered instantly after purchase.

title: Printable Morning Devotional Planner Pages - Weekly Digital Download
description: A set of 6 printable weekly devotional planner pages designed around the rhythms of faith: morning prayer, Scripture reading, gratitude, intention for the week, and an evening reflection. I use a version of these pages myself every morning. Designed in Canva, formatted for both letter size (8.5x11) and A5. Instant download - PDF only. Print as many times as you need. Black-and-white printer friendly. A new version releases each January.

title: Handmade Birthday Card - 'Another Year of Grace'
description: A single handmade birthday card with a hand-lettered sentiment and watercolor floral wreath in zinnias and greenery. Inside message: 'You carry more grace than you know. Happy birthday.' Ships with a kraft envelope in a protective sleeve. 5x7 inches, matte cardstock. I make these in small batches because each one deserves attention. Your recipient will feel it.

title: Small Batch Cornbread Mix - Memphis Kitchen, 2-Pack
description: Two bags of Rebecca's Memphis-style cornbread mix - the same recipe I've made for Sunday dinners for years. Each bag makes one 9-inch skillet of golden, slightly sweet Southern cornbread. Mix includes stone-ground yellow cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, and a pinch of salt. Just add buttermilk, egg, and butter. Instructions on the label. Packaged in a resealable kraft bag with a hand-written label. No preservatives. Makes a wonderful gift with a cast iron skillet.
tags: cornbread mix,Memphis,Southern food,homemade mix,food gift,baking gift,skillet cornbread,small batch

title: 'Tend Your Garden' Ceramic Pot Marker Set - 6 Faith & Garden Sayings
description: Six handmade ceramic pot markers hand-stamped with short sayings that bridge faith and gardening: 'Tend Well', 'Still Growing', 'Rooted', 'Give Thanks', 'Bloom Anyway', and 'Be Patient'. Each marker is approximately 4 inches tall with a pointed stake base. Kiln-fired in a matte cream glaze with black stamped text. Dishwasher safe, weather resistant. I put these in my garden every spring and people always ask about them at my house.
tags: ceramic pot markers,garden markers,faith garden,handmade ceramic,plant stakes,garden decor,Christian garden,plant gift

title: Handmade Thank You Card Set - 6 Cards, Botanical Watercolor
description: A set of 6 hand-lettered thank you cards with original botanical watercolor illustrations - zinnias, black-eyed Susans, and lavender sprigs. The sentiment reads 'Thank you, from the bottom of my heart' on the front; inside is blank for your personal note. 4.25x5.5 inches (A2), printed on 100 lb matte cardstock. Matching white envelopes included. I keep a stack of these on my desk and reach for them constantly.

title: Epiphany Light Card - 'The Light Has Come' Hand-Lettered, Single Card
description: A single hand-lettered Epiphany card featuring a sunrise over rolling hills in soft watercolor, with 'The Light Has Come' lettered in bold. The back includes the full passage from Isaiah 9:2 about the people walking in darkness who have seen a great light. Printed on heavyweight matte cardstock, 5x7 inches. Ships with a kraft envelope. I deliver the dawn meditation at Grace Community Church each New Year - this card was born out of that practice. Perfect for sending to someone who needs the reminder that light does come.
tags: Epiphany card,The Light Has Come,hand lettered,sunrise,faith card,Christian Epiphany,new year,church gift

title: Handmade New Baby Card - 'Welcome, Little One'
description: A single new baby card with hand-lettered sentiment and a delicate illustration of a sleeping infant cradled in a flower bloom. A favorite among nurses, chaplains, and anyone who has sat in a hospital room full of wonder.

title: Custom Hand-Lettered Name Print - Faith Quote, 5x7 or 8x10
description: A custom hand-lettered print featuring the recipient's name woven into a short faith quote of your choosing - or I can select one that fits the occasion (birthday, ordination, graduation, retirement, grief). Printed on 80 lb natural white matte paper. Choose 5x7 or 8x10 size. Message me with the name, occasion, and any preferred scripture or quote. Allow 7-10 business days for custom orders. Ships flat in a rigid mailer. Unframed.

title: Custom Bereavement Gift Box - Cards, Herbs & Seed Packet
description: A thoughtfully curated bereavement gift box for someone walking through grief. Includes: one 'You Are Not Alone' sympathy card, two dried lavender and rosemary herb bundles, one seed packet (zinnia or black-eyed Susan - the blooms of resilience), and a short handwritten note from me. Everything is made in my Memphis home studio. As a hospital chaplain for 15 years, I have learned that presence - even through the mail - matters. Box measures 7x5x3 inches. Ships in 3-5 business days.

title: Honoring the Women of Faith Card - 'The Steadiness of You' Hand-Lettered
